name: Workday
description: Cloud-based human capital management system used for core HR, recruiting, onboarding, and talent processes.

name: SAP SuccessFactors
description: Cloud HCM suite used for recruiting, performance, learning, and employee central.

name: Avature
description: Advanced talent acquisition and CRM platform used for recruiting workflows, candidate management, and job posting.

name: ServiceNow
description: Enterprise workflow and IT service management platform used for access provisioning, case management, and service requests.

name: Azure Active Directory
description: Cloud identity and access management platform used for authentication, SSO, and user provisioning.

name: MuleSoft
description: Enterprise integration platform used for API management, data transformation, and system-to-system connectivity.
